document.title: 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件

sourceSummary.oneLine: A minor design review report for Deco Sheet design and color changes for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents review of Deco Sheet appearance and color change and records immediate application timing.
keyPoints: The document grade is marked Minor.
The request category is 기타(외형 및 색상 변경).
Affected Deco Sheet parts include 1717_ABYZ_DECO_SHEET, 1717_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET, 1417_ABYZ_DECO_SHEET, and 1417_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET.

concepts.name: Deco Sheet design and color change
concepts.evidence: Deco Sheet 디자인 및 색상 변경 (Ubcare 向, ABYZ 向)

evidence.claim: The document is a design review report.
The document title is 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件.
evidence.evidenceText: 제목,"2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件"

evidence.claim: The document applies to models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
The request category is 기타(외형 및 색상 변경).
evidence.evidenceText: 요청구분,"□ 구매(원가/부품) □ 설계 오류 □ 고객 요청 ... ■ 기타(외형 및 색상 변경)"

evidence.claim: The reported phenomenon is Deco Sheet design and color change for Ubcare and ABYZ.
evidence.evidenceText:
1. 현상
 - Deco Sheet 디자인 및 색상 변경 (Ubcare 向, ABYZ 向)

evidence.claim: The cause is a design and color change from the existing Deco Sheet.
evidence.evidenceText:
2. 원인
 - 기존 Deco Sheet에서 디자인 및 색상 변경 건

evidence.claim: The measure is design and color change.
The application timing is immediate application.
